sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17951" key="au)to/sxolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτό-σχολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17951.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἑαυτῷ σχολάζων</ref></xr>, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
